title: Cooperative Task Scheduling on Bare-Metal MCU
content: Cooperative schedulers manage periodic tasks using a table of {period, last_run, callback} entries. The main loop scans the table each iteration in O(N) and dispatches any overdue task. Rate-Monotonic priority assigns shorter periods higher priority. A hardware watchdog resets the MCU if no task completes within the watchdog window; reset cause is written to EEPROM for forensic diagnostics.
